title: Aarab Optimized
description: Ultimate FPS boost modpack for low-end and mid PCs — smoother, faster, better Minecraft!
body:
🌟 About

Aarab Optimized is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack built for players who want the smoothest gameplay possible — even on low-end PCs.
This pack brings you powerful optimization mods, better performance tweaks, and essential QoL improvements without breaking the vanilla feel.

⚙️ Features

🚀 Massive FPS boost with optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight

🧠 Improved performance for low to mid-end systems

🔊 Better visuals with lightweight shader and resource-pack support

🧰 Enhanced gameplay while staying close to vanilla experience

💾 Optimized config files for maximum stability and minimal lag
